channel.title: Frontity is more than just blogs
channel.description:
http://tusjuegos.io/
Hi guys, I want to share with you all what I did with Frontity. Is not my best site, but I'm proud that I made it in one day. I think you can build almost everything with Frontity. So this is an example that shows the power of mixing Wordpress+React.
Cheers!

item.title: Frontity is more than just blogs
item.dc:creator: ali
item.description:
Love it, good work especially for a one-day project!

Read full topic
item.source: Frontity is more than just blogs

item.title: Frontity is more than just blogs
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Thanks for sharing @josema.enzo

Amazing that you made it in just one day!

Read full topic
item.source: Frontity is more than just blogs

http://tusjuegos.io/

Hi guys, I want to share with you all what I did with Frontity. Is not my best site, but I’m proud that I made it in one day. I think you can build almost everything with Frontity. So this is an example that shows the power of mixing Wordpress+React.

Cheers!
